questions.question: What frontend stack should this persona specialize in?

options.label: Web — React/TypeScript
options.description: Component-based web UI: React, TypeScript, modern CSS, accessibility.

options.label: Web — Vue/Svelte/other
options.description: A different web framework. Tell me which in notes.

options.label: SwiftUI / AppKit (macOS)
options.description: Native Apple UI — fits this MonitorIsland repo (Swift macOS app).

options.label: Framework-agnostic web
options.description: General HTML/CSS/JS UI work without committing to one framework.

questions.question: What should this persona OWN (pick all that apply)?

options.label: State management & data flow
options.description: Client state, stores, wiring data into the UI.

options.label: API integration (client side)
options.description: Calling backend APIs, handling loading/error states.

questions.question: Model tier for the execution worker (Claude + Codex runtimes)?

options.label: Capable + high effort (recommended)
options.description: Opus 4.8 / GPT-5.5 at high effort — best for real UI engineering.
